task.title: Prevent statement-boundary collapse during rejoining
task.summary: The formatter currently rejoins newline-separated commands as if later lines were argument continuations of the previous command.
task.problem: The command continuation heuristic in crates/nuparu-core/src/formatter.rs is too permissive. It collapses distinct statements like print + return, mkdir + cp, and print + mut into one line, which changes the structure and often the meaning of the code.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: The formatter does not merge adjacent top-level or block-level statements unless they are a real continuation of the same command.
Cases like print + return, rm + mkdir, mkdir + cp, print + mut, and print + do remain on separate lines.
New regression tests cover the failing fixture patterns, not just synthetic two-line examples.
